issue.title: Document APK releases on GitHub and public abcvlib consumption via JitPack

comment.body: Closing as addressed by the APKDistribution milestone work in [PR #203](https://github.com/tekkura/sr-android/pull/203), including the README/JitPack documentation follow-up merged into the milestone branch via [PR #205](https://github.com/tekkura/sr-android/pull/205). APK distribution is documented through GitHub Releases, and public `abcvlib` consumption is documented through JitPack.
